section.name: JMeter Compatibility
section.p: BreakTest is JMeter-compatible, but this site does not maintain a forked copy of the Apache JMeter manual. Keeping a copied manual would make the project look like a renamed JMeter site and would drift quickly from both projects.
section.h2: Use Apache JMeter Documentation For Generic Features
section.p: For the inherited test-plan model and common components, use the official Apache JMeter documentation:
Read the local BreakTest docs for behavior that is new, changed, or removed:

Some BreakTest files, properties, Java packages, loggers, variables, and certificate names still contain jmeter, JMeter, or org.apache.jmeter. Those names are retained where changing them would break existing JMX files, plugins, scripts, build integrations, or automation.
